title: Upload documents, ask a question, and receive a response with citations
description: Verifies a user can upload at least one document, send a chat message, and see an AI-style response that includes citation badges.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Click the upload area to open the file picker
Select multiple valid document files in the file picker
Fill a realistic legal question into the chat input
Send the chat message
Verify an assistant response is displayed for the sent message
Verify the assistant response includes citation badges

title: Create a new chat session and preserve separate message histories when switching
description: Verifies creating a new chat session and switching between sessions preserves each session’s message history and context independently.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Fill a unique message into the chat input
Send the chat message
Create a new chat session
Fill a different unique message into the chat input
Send the chat message
Switch back to the previous chat session
Verify the previous session shows its earlier message thread
Verify the other session’s message thread is not shown in the active session

title: Navigate between home, configuration, and playground using the mobile hamburger menu
description: Verifies on mobile layout the hamburger menu opens/closes and nav links route to the correct views.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the window to a mobile width
Open the hamburger menu
Use a nav link to navigate to the playground view
Verify the user lands on the playground view
Open the hamburger menu
Toggle the hamburger menu to close it
Verify the mobile navigation menu is closed

title: Upload documents via dropzone drag-and-drop and see list and capacity indicator update
description: Verifies dragging files into the dropzone adds them to the uploaded file list and updates file count/capacity indicator.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Drag multiple valid document files into the upload dropzone
Verify the uploaded file list shows the newly added files
Verify the file count or capacity indicator reflects the added files

title: Upload via file picker, remove a file, and see counts update
description: Verifies selecting multiple files through the file picker adds them to the list and removing one updates the list and file count.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Click the upload area to open the file picker
Select multiple valid document files in the file picker
Remove one file from the uploaded file list
Verify the removed file no longer appears in the uploaded file list
Verify the file count or capacity indicator decreases accordingly

title: Complete configuration, save, and view configuration summary
description: Verifies a user can fill required configuration fields, save the configuration, and see a summary of the saved settings.

steps.description: Navigate to /configuration
Select a case type from the case type dropdown
Fill Case Alpha into the case name field
Fill 12345 into the case number field
Select valid values for the available analysis options
Click Save Configuration
Verify a configuration summary is displayed

title: Use logo navigation to return to home from another view
description: Verifies clicking the logo returns the user to the marketing home page from another route.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Click the site logo
Verify the user lands on the marketing home view

title: Use quick question buttons to send a templated query and receive citations
description: Verifies quick question buttons send a prefilled query and display an AI-style response with citation badges.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Click a quick question button
Verify an assistant response is displayed for the quick question
Verify the assistant response includes citation badges

title: Required case name validation and recovery before starting analysis
description: Verifies saving without a case name shows validation, then allows saving after correction and starting analysis to the playground.

steps.description: Navigate to /configuration
Select a case type from the case type dropdown
Fill 98765 into the case number field
Click Save Configuration
Fill Case Beta into the case name field
Click Save Configuration
Click Start Analysis
Verify the user lands on the playground view

title: Enforce upload capacity and allow uploading again after removing a file
description: Verifies reaching the upload capacity prevents adding more files until one is removed, after which additional upload succeeds.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Add files repeatedly until the capacity indicator shows the limit is reached
Attempt to add one more valid file beyond capacity
Verify the UI indicates capacity has been reached and the additional file is not added
Remove one file from the uploaded file list
Add one valid file again
Verify the newly added file appears in the uploaded file list

title: Start analysis after saving shows configuration context in playground
description: Verifies starting analysis after saving configuration routes to the playground where configuration context is available.

steps.description: Navigate to /configuration
Select a case type from the case type dropdown
Fill Case Gamma into the case name field
Click Save Configuration
Click Start Analysis
Verify a configuration summary or context panel is displayed in the playground

title: Navigate marketing sections and activate configuration from CTA
description: Verifies a marketing visitor can scroll through key sections using navigation and reach the configuration page via a CTA.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to scroll to the Problem section
Click the navigation link to scroll to the How It Works section
Scroll to the bottom CTA area
Click the call-to-action that starts configuration
Verify the user lands on the configuration view

title: Toggle compact view and keep the setting when switching chat sessions
description: Verifies compact view can be toggled and remains consistent when the user switches between chat sessions.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Toggle compact view on
Create a new chat session
Switch back to the previous chat session
Verify compact view is still enabled for the chat interface

title: Hero animation and mock output render while enabling activation
description: Verifies the hero typewriter area and mock terminal output are visible and the user can proceed to configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the hero headline animation to progress
Scroll slightly within the hero area to view the mock terminal output
Click the primary call-to-action to start configuration
Verify the user lands on the configuration view

title: Delete a chat session and select a sensible remaining active session
description: Verifies a user can delete a session and the session list updates with an appropriate remaining session becoming active.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Create a new chat session
Create another new chat session
Delete the currently active chat session
Verify the deleted session no longer appears in the session list
Verify a remaining chat session is active and the chat input is usable

title: Scroll to marketing sections using top navigation anchors
description: Verifies the marketing page navigation can scroll to key sections using anchor links.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a top navigation link to a mid-page marketing section
Verify the target marketing section content is displayed in the viewport
Click a top navigation link to a different marketing section
Verify the newly targeted marketing section content is displayed in the viewport

title: Use trust/comparison exploration and reach configuration from CTA
description: Verifies a marketing visitor can review comparison/trust content and use a CTA to reach configuration.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the comparison section
Scroll to the trust pillars section
Click a call-to-action to start configuration
Verify the user lands on the configuration view

title: Rename a chat session and see the updated name in the session list
description: Verifies a user can rename a chat session and the session list reflects the updated session name.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Create a new chat session
Initiate renaming for the active chat session
Fill a new session name into the session name field
Confirm the session rename
Verify the session list displays the new session name

title: Return to marketing home from a non-home view via logo
description: Verifies the logo navigation returns the user to the marketing home view from another route.

steps.description: Navigate to /configuration
Click the site logo
Verify the marketing page hero content is displayed

title: Save configuration persists within the browser session on revisit
description: Verifies saved configuration remains available when the user leaves and returns to configuration within the same browser session.

steps.description: Navigate to /configuration
Select a case type from the case type dropdown
Fill Case Delta into the case name field
Click Save Configuration
Click the site logo to go to the marketing page
Click the call-to-action that starts configuration
Verify a configuration summary is displayed

title: Mobile navigation menu toggles and routes correctly
description: Verifies the hamburger menu opens/closes and selecting a nav item routes or scrolls appropriately on small screens.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a mobile width
Click the hamburger menu to open navigation
Click the navigation link to scroll to the How It Works section
Click the hamburger menu to close navigation
Verify the How It Works section content is displayed

title: Secondary hero action routes to configuration
description: Verifies the secondary hero action allows a marketing visitor to reach the configuration page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the secondary action in the hero section
Verify the user lands on the configuration view

title: Deep link directly to the playground and start a new session without prior setup
description: Verifies a user can load the playground directly and still create a chat session and interact with the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /playground
Create a new chat session
Fill a message into the chat input
Send the chat message
Verify the new message appears in the active session thread

title: Deep link to marketing home renders navigation and sections
description: Verifies the marketing page loads correctly on direct entry and provides section navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to scroll to the Problem section
Verify the Problem section content is displayed

title: Hero remains stable after resize
description: Verifies the hero content remains visible and usable after resizing the viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a mobile width
Resize the viewport back to a desktop width
Verify the hero headline area is displayed
